info.name: Sara Elevator API
info.description: Sara Elevator Management System REST API Collection

request.description: User login to get access token and refresh token.
Creates new user registration and automatically logs in. Role: PATRON or PERSONEL
Gets new access token using refresh token.

body.raw:
{
    "identityNumber": "ELEV-004",
    "buildingName": "New Business Center",
    "address": "456 Residential Avenue, Block B",
    "elevatorNumber": "A2",
    "floorCount": 4,
    "capacity": 450,
    "speed": 0.75,
    "technicalNotes": "New installation",
    "inspectionDate": "2024-01-01",
    "expiryDate": "2025-01-01"
}

request.description: Creates new elevator. expiryDate is automatically calculated (inspectionDate + 12 months).

body.raw:
{
    "identityNumber": "ELEV-004",
    "buildingName": "New Business Center Updated",
    "address": "456 Residential Avenue, Block B",
    "elevatorNumber": "A2",
    "floorCount": 5,
    "capacity": 630,
    "speed": 1.0,
    "inspectionDate": "2024-01-01"
}

query.description: true: only paid, false: only unpaid, empty: all

request.description: Lists all maintenance records. Filtering: paid (true/false), dateFrom, dateTo

query.description: Month format: YYYY-MM (e.g: 2026-01). Empty for current month

request.description: Gets monthly maintenance summary (total, paid, unpaid counts and amounts).
Gets maintenance record details by ID.
Gets maintenance records for a specific elevator.
Yakında dolacak (30 gün içinde) asansörleri getirir.
Dashboard özet istatistiklerini getirir (toplam asansör, bakım, gelir, borç, uyarılar).
Tüm arıza kayıtlarını listeler. status parametresi ile filtreleme yapılabilir.
ID'ye göre arıza kaydı detayını getirir.

body.raw:
{
    "elevatorId": 1,
    "faultSubject": "Motor çalışmıyor",
    "contactPerson": "Ahmet Yılmaz",
    "buildingAuthorizedMessage": "Acil müdahale gerekiyor",
    "description": "Asansör 2. katta takıldı"
}

request.description: Yeni arıza kaydı oluşturur. Durum otomatik olarak OPEN olarak ayarlanır.
ID'ye göre denetim kaydı detayını getirir.
Belirli bir asansöre ait denetim kayıtlarını getirir (date sıralı DESC).
Tüm tahsilat fişlerini listeler. Tarih aralığı ile filtreleme yapılabilir.
ID'ye göre tahsilat fişi detayını getirir.
Creates new payment receipt. Related maintenance is automatically marked as 'isPaid=true'.
Gets offers for a specific elevator.
Creates new offer. Items can be included. If items are provided, totals are recalculated automatically.
Updates existing offer. If items are provided, existing items are replaced and totals are recalculated.
Deletes offer and related offer items (cascade delete).

item.name: New UI Modules (2026-02)
item.description: Endpoints added for new UI modules (labels/contracts, EDM invoices/settings, payment transactions, stock, proposal, status reports).
